## Description

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Chore / Documentation / Improvement

## Architecture Check (Streaming BFF)
- [ ] Data transformation is handled in the Service/API layer.
- [ ] UI components use the streaming data correctly.
- [ ] No direct Acumatica credentials exposed in the frontend.
- [ ] Vanilla CSS follows project modularity rules.

## Testing Performed
